concierge_lifecycle.next_user_step: Cipher needs your attention for computer access setup.

setup_guidance.plain_language_summary: Cipher is ready but your computer connection needs a quick step.
setup_guidance.next_user_step: Open the Tailscale app and click Connect to join your tailnet.
setup_guidance.support_safe_notes: Owner needs to complete Tailscale device authorization.

tailscale_access.support_safe_notes: Tailscale is installed but this device needs to be authorized in your tailnet admin console.

computer_setup_guidance.plain_language_summary: Your computer needs one more step to connect to Cipher securely.
computer_setup_guidance.next_owner_step: Open the link sent to your email and click Authorize Device.
computer_setup_guidance.support_safe_notes: Device authorization is pending owner action.

backup_state.backup_health_summary: Backups are configured but running behind schedule
backup_state.recommended_action: Check that your backup drive is connected
backup_state.support_safe_notes: Backup frequency has dropped below expected interval.

intervention_state.plain_language_summary: No intervention needed - just waiting for you to complete the setup step.
intervention_state.estimated_resolution_summary: Should resolve immediately after device authorization
intervention_state.support_safe_notes: Owner action is the only blocker.

support_readiness.support_channel_summary: Support is available, but computer access features are limited until setup completes.
known_limitations: Remote computer access unavailable until Tailscale is connected

support_safe_summary: Cipher needs one quick step from you: authorize your device in Tailscale. Once that's done, everything will be fully connected.
